provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (NOTIFIED CISs)

[ S.L.370.34

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.34
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INVESTMENT SERVICES
ACT (NOTIFIED CISs)*
10 ta’ Ġunju, 2016
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 219 tal-2016, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 240 tal2021, 294 tal-2023 u 32 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ppubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1

Emendat:
A.L. 294 tal-2023.
